message:
fix(pager): evict page 1 from cache after Phase 2b header patching in journal commit

Phase 2b patches page_count, change_counter, and version_valid_for
directly on the db_file, bypassing the cache. Without evicting the
cached page 1, subsequent reads return stale header values. This
mirrors the eviction already done in SimplePagerCheckpointWriter::write_page().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
